executive_summary: Build failure detected on attempt 1 for repository scib_new on main branch. The build failed during GitHub Actions workflow execution. Detailed logs are available at the provided action URL for further investigation.

errors.description: Build failed during GitHub Actions workflow execution
errors.recommended_fix: Review GitHub Actions workflow logs at the provided URL to identify specific build issues. Check for missing dependencies, configuration errors, or environment setup problems.
errors.automated_remediation: Trigger workflow re-run after reviewing logs and applying necessary fixes
errors.compliance_notes: Build failure logged with full traceability via GitHub Actions URL
